name: Grade 11 Mathematics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for advanced functions, algebraic structures, statistics, and mathematical modeling. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in advanced functions, algebraic structures, statistics, and mathematical modeling.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

I can use appropriate disciplinary vocabulary, evidence, and tools to communicate my reasoning.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about advanced functions, algebraic structures, statistics, and mathematical modeling, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 11 task connected to advanced functions, algebraic structures, statistics, and mathematical modeling.
The learner uses relevant evidence, vocabulary, or a model to explain reasoning.
